seoTitle: Chewko vs Chillagoe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chewko and Chillagoe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chewko and Chillagoe.
heading: Chewko vs Chillagoe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chewko, Queensland and Chillagoe, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chillagoe has a lower overall climate risk score (22/100) compared to Chewko (28/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chewko or Chillagoe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chewko has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Chillagoe scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chewko scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Chillagoe scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chewko or Chillagoe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chillagoe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
